items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement for an automatic photo quality check, but the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to this requirement. While the linked use case outlines the need for an automatic photo quality check, there are no specific details or evidence confirming that this functionality has been implemented or tested. Therefore, the step cannot be conclusively validated.
